name: q
label: Search Query
help: Topic and/or place, e.g. 'comedy Chicago' (min 2 chars).

name: limit
label: Limit
help: Max items to return. Default 20, max 200. Billed per result.

name: cache
label: Cache
help: Responses are cached for 24 hours by default. Set false to bypass the cache and always fetch fresh data (default true).
